name: python-web-scraper
purpose: Web scraper with CSS selectors, retry logic, crawl mode, JSON/CSV output
recommend_when: User asks to scrape a website
User wants to extract data from HTML pages
User asks to parse HTML with CSS selectors
User wants to scrape multiple pages
instead_of: Writing requests + BeautifulSoup + retry logic + output formatting from scratch

customize.add_auth: Edit the headers dict in fetch() to add cookies or API tokens
customize.new_selectors: Add patterns in _matches() for custom CSS matching
customize.output_format: Add a function like output_json() for new formats
